task: Implement a bounded change in the parent session, verify it, and finish with a read-only review.
context: Use parent-only phases instead of child worker sessions.
constraints: Use the same parent session for the whole loop.
acceptance_criteria: Verification passes or failures are clearly recorded.
A final read-only review is completed.

phases.name: scan
phases.goal: Inspect the current workflow files and capture the minimum necessary context.
validation: List the files that define the current behavior.

phases.name: plan
phases.goal: Choose the smallest safe edit set and the validation sequence.

phases.name: implement
phases.goal: Apply the planned changes without expanding scope.
validation: Keep edits within the declared writable scope.

phases.name: verify
phases.goal: Run the narrowest useful checks and capture compact evidence.
validation: Record failures as short excerpts only.

phases.name: review
phases.goal: Review the final changed files for regressions, scope drift, and missing validation.
validation: Accept only if the final state is coherent.
If a material issue is found, define a bounded fix scope.
